title: Scaffold Rust project with Cargo workspace
Phase 3 validation: game loop test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 3 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Phase state machine transitions: Dawn→Action→Event→Dusk→Downtime→Dawn
- [ ] AP system: base AP correct per office level (local=5, state=6-7, federal=8-10, exec=10-12)
- [ ] AP spend: action costs deducted, insufficient AP blocks action
- [ ] AP does NOT carry over between turns
- [ ] D20 roll: distribution is uniform over 10K rolls (chi-squared test)
- [ ] Modifier stacking: trait + card + situational modifiers apply correctly
- [ ] Critical success (nat 20) and failure (nat 1) detected
- [ ] DC comparison: result >= DC = success, result < DC = failure
- [ ] Week counter increments correctly, year rolls over at week 52

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Full turn cycle: Dawn briefing → player spends AP → events fire → Dusk resolves → autosave
- [ ] Phase-aware UI: status bar changes text for each phase
- [ ] Input line prompt changes per phase (Free Roam vs Conversation vs Crisis)
- [ ] /end command triggers Dusk phase even with remaining AP (with confirmation)
- [ ] AP depletion auto-triggers Dusk phase
- [ ] Event interrupts: crisis fires mid-Action phase, returns to Action after
- [ ] Mock AI DM generates morning briefing during Dawn phase

## Headless Tests
- [ ] 50-turn headless simulation completes without panic (mock AI)
- [ ] Game state serializes/deserializes correctly between turns
- [ ] No memory growth over 50 turns

Phase 5 validation: social systems test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 5 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Social graph: add 100 NPCs + 500 edges, serialize to RocksDB, restore exactly
- [ ] Relationship edge fields all bounded (trust -100..100, fear 0..100, etc.)
- [ ] modify_rel() tool call correctly updates edge weights
- [ ] NPC memory: add 10 memories, retrieve by entity prefix scan
- [ ] Propagation: betray NPC A → A's allies (loyalty>60) trust decreases by attenuated amount
- [ ] Propagation: 3+ degrees = zero impact (damping verified)
- [ ] Propagation timing: rumors spread 1-2 hops per week (not instant)
- [ ] NPC decision loop: high-ruthlessness NPC schemes against rivals
- [ ] NPC lifecycle: age increments, health degrades, retirement triggers
- [ ] Staff salary deducted from war chest weekly
- [ ] Staff deployed = unavailable for other tasks that week
- [ ] Staff competence affects briefing quality (measurable output difference)
- [ ] Stress accumulates from crises, reduces from downtime/family
- [ ] High stress (>80) applies negative dice roll modifier

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Conversation with NPC: modify_rel() fires, relationship overlay updates
- [ ] Betray NPC → next week briefing mentions ally reaction (propagation + narration)
- [ ] Staff morning briefing: quality correlates with CoS competence stat
- [ ] Family event: kid's school play vs vote → choosing one affects the other
- [ ] NPC retires → replacement NPC spawned with era-appropriate traits
- [ ] Group conversation: 3 NPCs react in personality-driven order

## Graph Tests
- [ ] Shortest path between any two NPCs computable via petgraph
- [ ] Connected components: identify isolated NPC clusters
- [ ] Graph with 1000 nodes / 10000 edges: all operations < 10ms

title: Phase 4 validation: character & card test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 4 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Character entity serializes to/from RocksDB correctly
- [ ] Big Five personality traits generate within valid ranges
- [ ] All 9+ archetypes produce distinct starter decks
- [ ] Card TOML files parse into Card entities without error
- [ ] Tactic card requirements check: blocks play without required asset
- [ ] Asset cards persist across turns until explicitly revoked
- [ ] Position card coherence: aligned pair = +1, contradictory pair = -1
- [ ] Coherence thresholds: >5 = Principled, <-3 = Flip-flopper
- [ ] Card evolution: play count tracked, upgrade triggers at threshold
- [ ] Card degradation: neglect counter increments, asset removed at threshold
- [ ] Deck max size enforced: adding past limit forces discard selection
- [ ] Rarity distribution: card acquisition respects rarity weights

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Character creation → game start: all selected attributes reflected in entity
- [ ] Card play during conversation: tactic card modifies dice roll correctly
- [ ] Card acquisition from event: grant_card() tool call → card in player deck
- [ ] Card revocation: revoke_card() → card removed, effects reversed
- [ ] Deck overlay: displays all cards grouped by type with correct stats
- [ ] Inline card play: cards appear in chat when contextually relevant
- [ ] Coherence check runs at Dusk phase, affects approval rating

## SDK Tests
- [ ] Custom card defined in TOML loads and is playable
- [ ] Card TOML schema validated by polit-sdk validate
- [ ] Mod can add new card type via create_card() Rhai function

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 6 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Law entity serializes with all fields (provisions, modifiers, status)
- [ ] Legislative pipeline: draft→committee→floor→vote→enact status transitions
- [ ] Vote calculation: NPC votes based on ideology alignment + party pressure + relationship + constituent pressure
- [ ] Mechanical enforcement: enacted law with economic_modifiers applies to sim variables
- [ ] Card enforcement: law restricting card type → card play triggers scandal event
- [ ] Roll enforcement: law changes DC for specific actions
- [ ] Constitutional check: law flagged if violating constitutional provision
- [ ] Amendment process: Article V requirements enforced (2/3 + 3/4 ratification)
- [ ] Court ruling updates constitutional interpretation
- [ ] Government org entity stores budget, headcount, morale correctly
- [ ] Career path progression: GS-5→GS-15 with time-in-grade requirements
- [ ] Appointee lifecycle: president change → appointees replaced

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Full law lifecycle: player drafts → AI converts to legal text → committee vote → floor debate (event phase) → enact → enforcement applies
- [ ] Law affects economy: minimum wage law → economic model adjusts
- [ ] Veto override: 2/3 vote bypasses presidential veto
- [ ] Court challenge: NPC files challenge → court hearing event → ruling
- [ ] Budget wars: department budget request → congressional appropriation
- [ ] Law browser overlay: shows all active laws with status and effects

## SDK Tests
- [ ] Custom law effects definable in Rhai via on_law_enacted hook
- [ ] Scenario mod can provide alternative government structure
- [ ] enact_law() and repeal_law() Rhai functions work correctly

title: Inline card play UI: contextual card options in chat stream
Phase 3: Core Simulation — Game Loop, Dice, AP, Turns
POLIT: Full Development Pipeline

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# POLIT Full Development Pipeline

Master epic for building the POLIT American Politics Simulator.

## Architecture
- Rust (bevy_ecs 0.18, Ratatui 0.30, mistral.rs, RocksDB, petgraph, Rhai)
- Local Gemma 12B-it GGUF via mistral.rs with grammar-constrained tool calling
- Chat-forward TUI with floating overlays
- Full GDD: docs/gdd/ (21 sections)

## Phase Order
1. Foundation (project scaffold, ECS world, persistence, basic TUI)
2. AI Harness (mistral.rs integration, tool router, DM modes)
3. Core Simulation (game loop, dice, AP system, turn structure)
4. Character & Cards (deckbuilder, character creation, card engine)
5. Social Systems (NPC graph, relationships, staff, family)
6. Political Systems (law engine, government, elections)
7. World Simulation (economy, demographics, geopolitics)
8. Information & Media (news system, corporate reactions)
9. Advanced Features (freeform action engine, audio, custom events)
10. Content & Data (data pipeline, scenario seeding, historical data)
11. Modding & SDK (Rhai scripting, mod loader, SDK CLI)
12. Polish & Release (tutorial, onboarding, balance, CI/CD, packaging)

Each phase has validation criteria and tests that must pass before proceeding.

Speech gameplay: voice input analyzed for roll modifiers in speeches/debates

Surface indicator layer: simple gauges computed from macro model
Card entity: tactic/asset/position types with effects schema
Title screen: New Campaign / Tutorial / Settings / Quit
Hook system: 40+ lifecycle/system/entity/UI/AI hook points
Phase 2 validation: AI harness test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 2 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] mistral.rs loads GGUF model file and generates tokens
- [ ] GBNF grammar rejects malformed tool calls (fuzz test with 100 random inputs)
- [ ] GBNF grammar accepts all 15 valid tool call types
- [ ] Tool router correctly maps each tool call to ECS command
- [ ] Context builder stays within 10K token budget
- [ ] Context builder includes: system prompt, world summary, scene, NPCs, history
- [ ] Prompt TOML files parse and populate system prompt correctly
- [ ] Mock AI returns deterministic tool calls for given inputs

## Integration Tests
- [ ] End-to-end: user text → context build → inference → tool call → ECS mutation → narrate to UI
- [ ] Streaming: tokens appear in UI one-by-one (typewriter effect)
- [ ] DM Narrator mode produces narrate() + schedule_event() calls
- [ ] DM Conversation mode produces narrate() + modify_rel() calls
- [ ] DM DungeonMaster mode produces set_dc() + branch_scene() calls
- [ ] Tone prompt changes alter narrative style (side-by-side comparison test)
- [ ] Mock AI mode: full game loop runs 10 turns without real model

## Performance Tests
- [ ] Context build takes < 50ms
- [ ] Tool call JSON parsing takes < 1ms
- [ ] First token latency measured and logged
- [ ] Memory usage stable across 100 inference calls (no leak)

## SDK Tests
- [ ] Custom tool definitions can be registered via mod hook
- [ ] extend_tools hook adds new tool to GBNF grammar dynamically

Phase 1 validation: integration test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 1 Validation Gate

ALL must pass before Phase 2 begins:

## Unit Tests
- [ ] ECS World boots, entities can be spawned with components
- [ ] Systems run in correct order via bevy Schedule
- [ ] RocksDB opens, writes to all column families, reads back correctly
- [ ] Snapshot create/restore produces identical state
- [ ] TOML config files parse without errors, defaults applied for missing fields
- [ ] Slash command parser correctly identifies: /meet, /draft, /help, /end, unknown commands

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Full app lifecycle: boot → render frame → process input → shutdown cleanly
- [ ] UI thread and Game thread communicate via crossbeam channels without deadlock
- [ ] Chat stream renders styled text (white narration, cyan NPC, yellow events, red warnings)
- [ ] Overlay system: open panel → dimmed background → close with Esc → chat restored
- [ ] Command palette opens with Tab, navigates with arrows, selects with Enter
- [ ] Save game creates RocksDB checkpoint, load restores exact state
- [ ] Config hot-reload: change theme.toml → UI colors update

## Smoke Tests
- [ ] `cargo run` boots to title screen without panic
- [ ] `cargo run -- --headless` boots without TUI, exits cleanly
- [ ] `cargo test` passes all unit + integration tests
- [ ] `cargo clippy` produces zero warnings
- [ ] Binary size is reasonable (< 50MB without model weights)

## Architecture Validation
- [ ] No direct coupling between UI and Game threads (all via channels)
- [ ] RocksDB column families match GDD spec: characters, relationships, npc_memories, laws, economy, cards, world_state, information, meta_progression, custom_events, wiki_cache
- [ ] ECS entities can be serialized to/from RocksDB via serde

Phase 11 validation: modding & SDK test suite

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 11 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Rhai sandbox: infinite loop killed by CPU budget
- [ ] Rhai sandbox: memory allocation capped at limit
- [ ] Rhai sandbox: file I/O and network calls blocked
- [ ] All 40+ API functions callable from Rhai (enumerate and invoke each)
- [ ] get_var/set_var: read and write simulation variables
- [ ] spawn_npc: creates entity with correct components
- [ ] trigger_event: fires event that systems process
- [ ] roll_check: returns result with correct modifiers
- [ ] grant_card/revoke_card: modify player deck
- [ ] enact_law/repeal_law: modify active law set
- [ ] Mod manifest parsing: all fields validated
- [ ] Conflict detection: two conflicting mods → load blocked with error

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Mod loads at startup: hooks registered, scripts executed at correct lifecycle points
- [ ] on_dawn_phase hook fires every turn, receives world state
- [ ] on_law_enacted hook fires when law passes, can add custom effects
- [ ] on_card_played hook fires with card context
- [ ] register_command hook adds new slash command that works in game
- [ ] register_overlay hook adds new floating panel accessible from palette
- [ ] extend_tools hook adds DM tool, appears in GBNF grammar
- [ ] Total conversion scenario loads with replaced government/cards/economy
- [ ] polit-sdk validate catches: missing required files, invalid TOML, broken deps
- [ ] polit-sdk test runs headless sim with mod loaded, no crash

## SDK CLI Tests
- [ ] polit-sdk new test_mod --type scenario → scaffolds complete directory
- [ ] polit-sdk validate mods/test_mod → reports errors for invalid data
- [ ] polit-sdk package mods/test_mod → produces distributable archive
- [ ] polit-sdk install archive.tar.gz → installs to mods/ directory
- [ ] polit-sdk conflicts → detects and reports conflicting mods

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 12 Validation Gate — RELEASE READINESS

## Tutorial Tests
- [ ] Tutorial boots from title screen
- [ ] 12-week guided campaign completes without crash
- [ ] Each week introduces exactly one new mechanic
- [ ] Tutorial DM prompts are helpful and non-overwhelming
- [ ] Continue / New Campaign / Main Menu works after tutorial
- [ ] Progressive disclosure: tooltip appears on first encounter of each system
- [ ] /help <topic> returns useful information for all topics

## First Launch Tests
- [ ] Hardware detection correctly identifies CPU, RAM, GPU
- [ ] Correct model recommended based on hardware
- [ ] Model downloads from HF Hub, progress bar shown
- [ ] Game boots after model download, no manual config needed
- [ ] Graceful error if download fails (offline mode hint)

## Balance Tests
- [ ] 1000 Monte Carlo runs complete without panic
- [ ] No dominant archetype (win rate variance < 15% across archetypes)
- [ ] No unwinnable starting positions
- [ ] Average career length: 30-80 weeks (not too short, not infinite)
- [ ] Economy: no hyperinflation or deflation spiral in 90% of runs
- [ ] Card rarity: legendary cards appear in < 5% of runs
- [ ] Elections: incumbent advantage exists but is overcomeable

## CI/CD Tests
- [ ] cargo clippy --all-targets -- zero warnings
- [ ] cargo fmt --check passes
- [ ] cargo test passes all unit + integration tests
- [ ] Headless sim: 100 turns, mock AI, no panic
- [ ] Cross-compile succeeds for all 5 target triples
- [ ] Release binary runs on clean system (no dev deps needed)
- [ ] polit-sdk validate game/ passes for default scenario

## Release Checklist
- [ ] Binary < 50MB (without model)
- [ ] Startup to title screen < 3 seconds
- [ ] First turn response < 15 seconds (12B Q4 on recommended hardware)
- [ ] Memory usage < 2GB during normal gameplay (excluding model)
- [ ] Clean shutdown: no data corruption on ctrl+c
- [ ] Save/load roundtrip: zero data loss

comments.author: shinyobjectz
comments.text:
# Phase 8 Validation Gate

## Unit Tests
- [ ] Info entity: all fields serialize, truth_value bounded 0.0-1.0, severity 1-10
- [ ] Knowledge graph: add knower, query knowers, track source chain
- [ ] Spread: low-discretion NPC leaks info to journalist within 2 weeks
- [ ] Spread: high-discretion NPC holds secret for 10+ weeks
- [ ] Media pickup: newsworthiness × severity > threshold → story publishes
- [ ] Editorial lean: left-leaning outlet more likely to run anti-right stories
- [ ] Ownership suppression: corporate owner suppresses story about parent company
- [ ] News cycle: severity 8 story lasts 4+ weeks, severity 3 fades in 1 week
- [ ] Corporate reaction matrix: policy impact -5 → threaten plant closure
- [ ] Sector interest table: all sectors have correct wants/opposes/lobby_intensity
- [ ] Foreign influence: accepting foreign money creates high-severity info entity

## Integration Tests
- [ ] Player bribes NPC → info entity created → spreads through graph → media picks up → scandal
- [ ] /leak command: player deliberately sends info to journalist NPC → story runs
- [ ] /spin command: press sec competence affects spin success probability
- [ ] /suppress command: costs AP, success based on evidence_level + media relationship
- [ ] Corporate lobbying: pass anti-industry law → lobbyist requests meeting next turn
- [ ] Morning briefing: headlines reflect actual published stories from info system
- [ ] Info tracker overlay: shows secrets categorized by about-you / about-others

## Cross-System Tests
- [ ] Info × Cards: opposition research tactic → generates info entity
- [ ] Info × Law: criminal info + documented evidence → triggers investigation
- [ ] Info × Economy: corporate scandal → sector confidence drops
- [ ] Info × Elections: October surprise timing affects vote calculation
